message:
style(sync): normalize line breaking in path canonicalization expressions

Formatting consistency cleanup in sync path handling:

mod.rs:
- Collapse single-line unwrap_or_else chains in preflight_export()
  and preflight_import() path canonicalization

path.rs:
- Expand overly long lines in require_safe_sync_overwrite_path()
- Collapse short unwrap_or_else in validate_temp_file_path()

No behavioral changes - rustfmt normalization only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
